title: CHILD CARE LICENSING DIVISION - 211info
text: DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE CHILD CARE LICENSING DIVISION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assures the safety of children in care by licensing child care facilities and assessing child care complaints against licensed providers. The Division has licensing staff statewide. Licensing staff inspect child care facilities, assess complaints against facilities, and provide technical assistance to child care providers. Families researching child care options can access child care safety records, including complaint and compliance history, emergency suspensions, and injury logs. 700 Summer Street NE Suite 350 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email - (800) 556-6616 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 556-6616 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make a complaint FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, Russian, Vietnamese, Chinese AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Child Care Complaints Facility Licensing * Child Care Issues Organizational Consultation/Technical Assistance * Child Care Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEPARTMENT OF EARLY LEARNING AND CARE
